title: ResponseEnvelope v1
description: Machine-readable schema for the final answer returned from swarm procurement or collaborative answer flow.

response/id.description: Stable identifier of the returned response boundary object.

question/id.description: Question lifecycle identifier from which the response originated.

room/id.description: Room or execution path that produced the final answer or accepted summary.

contract/id.description: Linked procurement contract when payment or narrowed execution applied.

receipt/id.description: Linked procurement receipt when settlement or explicit rejection was recorded.

accepted-summary/id.description: Accepted summary identifier when the final answer is derived from room convergence.

source/node-id.description: Primary remote responder or answer-authoring node at the protocol boundary.

gateway/node-id.description: Gateway node when the result was delivered through a delegated host or other relay role.

answer/content.description: Returned answer payload in textual or structured form.

answer/format.description: Representation format of the returned answer payload.

confidence/signal.description: Composite confidence signal shown to the consumer of the response.

uncertainty/signal.description: Optional uncertainty signal paired with or derived from confidence.

human-linked-participation.description: Whether human-linked input materially influenced the final result.

provenance/origin-classes.description: Origin classes materially present in the answer path.
